title: Create FreundeMC
description: A modpack that focuses on the CreateMod and adds new features, biomes and more but still keeps the vanilla Minecraft progression.
body:
This Modpack adds tech and utility mods for a better modded experience and harmony with vanilla and modded minecraft.

It's focused on keeping the Vanilla Minecraft feeling but still being able to explore new and exciting stuff. So if you want a Create Modpack that doesn't feel too modded you should try this!

This Modpack includes **Create** and many **Create Addons**. It also includes mods like **Farmer's Delight**, **Applied Energistics 2** and many more.
